mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ldap_configurations ( customer_id, enabled, server_host, server_port, use_ssl, use_tls, bind_dn, bind_password, base_dn, user_search_filter, user_name_attribute, user_email_attribute, user_first_name_attribute, user_last_name_attribute, group_search_filter, group_name_attribute, admin_group_dn, auto_create_users, auto_assign_configuration_id, connection_timeout, read_timeout, last_sync_at, sync_enabled, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, COALESCE(#{enabled}, FALSE), #{serverHost}, COALESCE(#{serverPort}, 389), COALESCE(#{useSsl}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{useTls}, FALSE), #{bindDn}, #{bindPassword}, #{baseDn}, COALESCE(#{userSearchFilter}, '(uid={0})'), COALESCE(#{userNameAttribute}, 'uid'), COALESCE(#{userEmailAttribute}, 'mail'), COALESCE(#{userFirstNameAttribute}, 'givenName'), COALESCE(#{userLastNameAttribute}, 'sn'), #{groupSearchFilter}, COALESCE(#{groupNameAttribute}, 'cn'), #{adminGroupDn}, COALESCE(#{autoCreateUsers}, TRUE), #{autoAssignConfigurationId}, COALESCE(#{connectionTimeout}, 5000), COALESCE(#{readTimeout}, 10000), #{lastSyncAt}, COALESCE(#{syncEnabled}, FALSE), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ldap_configurations WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ldap_configurations SET enabled = #{enabled}, server_host = #{serverHost}, server_port = #{serverPort}, use_ssl = #{useSsl}, use_tls = #{useTls}, bind_dn = #{bindDn}, bind_password = COALESCE(#{bindPassword}, bind_password), base_dn = #{baseDn}, user_search_filter = #{userSearchFilter}, user_name_attribute = #{userNameAttribute}, user_email_attribute = #{userEmailAttribute}, user_first_name_attribute = #{userFirstNameAttribute}, user_last_name_attribute = #{userLastNameAttribute}, group_search_filter = #{groupSearchFilter}, group_name_attribute = #{groupNameAttribute}, admin_group_dn = #{adminGroupDn}, auto_create_users = #{autoCreateUsers}, auto_assign_configuration_id = #{autoAssignConfigurationId}, connection_timeout = #{connectionTimeout}, read_timeout = #{readTimeout}, sync_enabled = #{syncEnabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ldap_configurations WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, c.name AS config_name FROM ldap_group_mappings m LEFT JOIN configurations c ON m.local_configuration_id = c.id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, c.name AS config_name FROM ldap_group_mappings m LEFT JOIN configurations c ON m.local_configuration_id = c.id WHERE m.ldap_config_id = #{ldapConfigId} ORDER BY m.priority DESC, m.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ldap_group_mappings SET ldap_group_dn = #{ldapGroupDn}, local_role = #{localRole}, local_configuration_id = #{localConfigurationId}, priority = #{priority} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE ldap_sync_logs SET status = #{status}, users_synced = #{usersSynced}, users_created = #{usersCreated}, users_updated = #{usersUpdated}, users_failed = #{usersFailed}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = COALESCE(#{completedAt}, NOW()) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ldap_sync_logs WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
